senses.gloss: one of the names of Hell in Islam

examples.text:
وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوَازِينُهُ
فَأُمُّهُ هَاوِيَةٌ
وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا هِيَهْ
نَارٌ حَامِيَةٌ
examples.english: But as for one whose scales are light, his refuge will be an abyss. And what can make you know what that is? It is a Fire, intensely hot.
